content: (Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): MJR stands in a dimly lit ancient hall, surrounded by towering stone pillars carved with intricate, weathered motifs that fade into shadows. The floor is a cracked stone pathway, stretching forward into darkness, flanked by raised platforms on either side. A faint green glow emanates from high above, near the arched ceiling, casting eerie highlights on the rough-hewn walls. Further ahead, a subtle blue luminescence flickers from an unseen source, partially illuminating more pillars and suggesting a deeper chamber beyond.)

Lydia: By Dibella's tits, these Dwemer ruins reek of rust and stale cum.
